title: PHQ-9 Depression Self-Assessment
description: A widely used 9-item questionnaire that helps you understand your current mood and depression levels.
instructions: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

questions.text: Little interest or pleasure in doing things
Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much
Feeling tired or having little energy
Feeling bad about yourself — or that you are a failure or have let yourself or your family down
Trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television
Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed? Or the opposite — being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual
Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself in some way

bands.label: Minimal Depression
bands.description: Your responses suggest minimal depression. Continue your self-care practices and the strategies you'll learn in this course.

bands.label: Mild Depression
bands.description: Your responses suggest mild depression. The behavioral activation and coping techniques in this course can be very helpful at this level.

bands.label: Moderate Depression
bands.description: Your responses suggest moderate depression. Consider speaking with a healthcare professional alongside the strategies in this course.

bands.label: Moderately Severe Depression
bands.description: Your responses suggest moderately severe depression. Professional treatment is recommended. This course can complement professional care.

bands.label: Severe Depression
bands.description: Your responses suggest severe depression. Please seek professional treatment. This educational content is not a substitute for professional care.

scoring.functionalImpairmentQuestion: If you checked off any problems, how difficult have these problems made it for you to do your work, take care of things at home, or get along with other people?

disclaimer: This is an educational self-check tool, not a clinical diagnosis. If you are in crisis or having thoughts of self-harm, please call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) immediately.
